content: Phase 1: POC passes all exit criteria (24/24)
Phase 2: Full app built (backend + frontend, all features)

Phase 3: Fix any issues found (none found)
Phase 4: Vercel readiness (serverless entry, vercel.json, DEPLOYMENT.md, build verified)
